title: Text Customiser
description: Lets you customise text based on various properties such as colour, boldness, font, etc using resourcepacks
body:
Text Customiser is a mod that allows you to customise the colour of text based on various properties such as colour, boldness, font, etc using resourcepacks ## Users **! This mod does not do anything without a compatible resourcepack !** To use a resourcepack made for this mod, simply enable it from the resourcepacks menu just like any other resourcepack! ## Resourcepack Developers Want to use this mod in your resourcepack? Visit the wiki to get started [https://github.com/Enchanted-Games/text-customiser/wiki](https://github.com/Enchanted-Games/text-customiser/wiki) ## License

Text Customiser by ioblackshaw (a.k.a. Enchanted_Games) is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0

Video content creators may monetise videos including this work provided the license is followed.
